revision.text:
'''菅原神社'''（すがわらじんじゃ）は、[[福岡県]][[北九州市]][[小倉北区]]古船場町にある[[天満宮]]の1つである。
== 由来 ==
== 祭事暦 ==
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.sugakou.or.jp/ 菅原神社ホームページ]
{{Shinto-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:菅原神社}} [[Category:北九州市の神社]] [[Category:天満宮]] [[Category:小倉北区 (北九州市)]]

'''菅原神社'''（すがわらじんじゃ）は、[[福岡県]][[北九州市]][[小倉北区]]古船場町にある[[天満宮]]の1つである。
== 由来 ==
== 祭事暦 ==
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.sugakou.or.jp/ 菅原神社ホームページ]
{{Shinto-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:菅原神社}} [[Category:北九州市の神社]] [[Category:天満宮]] [[Category:小倉北区]]

'''菅原神社'''（すがわらじんじゃ）は、[[福岡県]][[北九州市]][[小倉北区]]古船場町にある[[天満宮]]の1つである。
== 由来 ==
== 祭事暦 == *[[1月1日]] - 歳旦祭 *[[4月24日|4月24]]・[[4月25日|25日]] - 春季大祭 *[[7月25日|25日]] - 夏越祭
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.sugakou.or.jp/ 菅原神社ホームページ]
{{Shinto-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:菅原神社}} [[Category:北九州市の神社]] [[Category:天満宮]] [[Category:小倉北区]]

'''菅原神社'''（すがわらじんじゃ）は、[[福岡県]][[北九州市]][[小倉北区]]古船場町にある[[天満宮]]の1つである。
== 由来 ==
== 年中行事 == *[[1月1日]] - 歳旦祭 *[[4月24日|4月24日]]・[[4月25日|25日]] - 春季大祭 *[[7月25日|7月25日]] - 夏越祭
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.sugakou.or.jp/ 菅原神社ホームページ]
{{Shinto-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:菅原神社}} [[Category:北九州市の神社]] [[Category:天満宮]] [[Category:小倉北区]]

{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Sugawara Shrine | image = [[File:菅原神社 (北九州市小倉北区).JPG|250px]] | location = 1-6 Furubamba-cho, Kokurakita-ku, Kitakyushu-shi, Fukuoka-ken, Japan | coordinates= {{Coord|33|52|49.7|N|130|52|51.2|E|type:landmark_region:JP-40|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|菅原道真}}
{{ill|Toyohiwake no Mikoto|ja|豊日別尊}}
{{ill|Konohanasakuya-hime|ja|木花咲耶媛命}}
{{ill|Ōyamakui no Kami|ja|大山咋命}}
{{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|市寸島比賣命}}
{{ill|Prince Shōtoku|ja|聖徳太子}} (Toyosumimimi no Mikoto, 豊總耳皇命)
{{ill|Taira no Kagekiyo|ja|藤原景清}} (Kagekiyo’s spirit, 景清霊)
{{ill|Mikatsuchi|ja|水分神}}
{{ill|Ukanomitama|ja|宇迦之魂尊}}
{{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|ja|猿田彦命}} | Status = | founded = | main hall = | alternate names = | annual Events = {{bulleted list | New Year’s Day festival (January 1) | Spring festival (April 24–25) | Summer Purification festival (July 25) }} | Rituals = | map = {{location map|Japan Fukuoka Prefecture|label=Sugawara Shrine|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''Sugawara Shrine''' (すがわらじんじゃ) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in {{ill|Kokurakita-ku|ja|小倉北区}}, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, [[Fukuoka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the many shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|菅原道真}}, a deity associated with learning and scholarship. == Origin == {{section-stub}} == annual Events == * [[January 1]]: New Year’s Day festival (歳旦祭) * [[April 24]]–[[April 25|25]]: Spring festival (春季大祭) * [[July 25]]: Summer Purification festival (夏越祭) == Access == * The shrine is accessible via the {{ill|Kitakyushu Monorail|ja|北九州高速鉄道}} at {{ill|Tanga Station|ja|旦過駅}}. == External Links == * {{Official website|name=Sugawara Shrine}} {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sugawara Shrine}} [[Category:Shrines in Kitakyushu]] [[Category:History of Kokurakita-ku]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kokurakita-ku]] [[Category:Tenman-gū]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Sugawara Shrine]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:bump-01-18]]

Text replacement - "ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イチキシマヒメ" to ""
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Merge [[Category:小倉北区の歴史]] into [[Category:History of Kokura-Kita Ward]] via bot
Bot: prepend Wikidata AFC comment via pages.txt
Text replacement - "水分神|" to "水分神|1=Mikumari|2=ja|3=水分神|4=zh|5=水分神|6=sv|7=Mikumari-no-Kami|8=fr|9=Mikumari|"

Bot: prepend Wikidata AFC comment via pages.txt
Removing from [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Text replacement - "|Sugawara no Michizane|" to "|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|"
Bot: remove invalid enwiki interwiki links
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links

'''Sugawara Shrine''' (すがわらじんじゃ) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kokurakita-ku, Kitakyūshū|Kokurakita-ku]], [[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyushu]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the many shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}}, a deity associated with learning and scholarship.

== Origin ==
{{section-stub}}

== annual Events ==
* [[:en:January 1|January 1]]: New Year’s Day festival (歳旦祭)
* [[:en:April 24|April 24]]–[[:en:April 25|25]]: Spring festival (春季大祭)
* [[:en:July 25|July 25]]: Summer Purification festival (夏越祭)

== Access ==
* The shrine is accessible via the [[:en:Kitakyushu Monorail|Kitakyushu Monorail]] at [[:en:Tanga Station|Tanga Station]].

== External Links ==
* {{Official website|name=Sugawara Shrine}}

'''Sugawara Shrine''' (すがわらじんじゃ) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Kokurakita-ku, Kitakyūshū|Kokurakita-ku]], [[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyushu]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]], Japan. It is one of the many shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}}, a deity associated with learning and scholarship.

== Origin ==
{{section-stub}}

== annual Events ==
* [[:en:January 1|January 1]]: New Year’s Day festival (歳旦祭)
* [[:en:April 24|April 24]]–[[:en:April 25|25]]: Spring festival (春季大祭)
* [[:en:July 25|July 25]]: Summer Purification festival (夏越祭)

== Access ==
* The shrine is accessible via the [[:en:Kitakyushu Monorail|Kitakyushu Monorail]] at [[:en:Tanga Station|Tanga Station]].

'''Sugawara Shrine''' (すがわらじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kokurakita-ku, Kitakyūshū|en|Kokurakita-ku, Kitakyūshū|WD=Q1042291|lt=Kokurakita-ku|1=Kokurakita-ku, Kitakyūshū}}, {{ill|Kitakyushu|en|Kitakyushu|WD=Q188806|lt=Kitakyushu|1=Kitakyushu}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}, Japan. It is one of the many shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}}, a deity associated with learning and scholarship.

== Origin ==
{{section-stub}}

== annual Events ==
* {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|WD=Q2150|lt=January 1|1=January 1}}: New Year’s Day festival (歳旦祭)
* {{ill|April 24|en|April 24|WD=Q2529|lt=April 24|1=April 24}}–{{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=25|1=April 25}}: Spring festival (春季大祭)
* {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|WD=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}}: Summer Purification festival (夏越祭)

== Access ==
* The shrine is accessible via the {{ill|Kitakyushu Monorail|en|Kitakyushu Monorail|WD=Q1136497|lt=Kitakyushu Monorail|1=Kitakyushu Monorail}} at {{ill|Tanga Station|en|Tanga Station|WD=Q7682779|lt=Tanga Station|1=Tanga Station}}.
